name: ANC: Social Renewal & The NHI
objective: Inform citizens about the National Health Insurance (NHI) and secure support for social grant expansion.
mainMessage: Working together to build a better life: Protecting our democracy through social security and universal healthcare.
talkingPoints: NHI: Quality healthcare for all, not just those who can afford medical aid.
Social Grants: Expanding the safety net for the unemployed and vulnerable.
Title Deeds: Accelerating the delivery of housing and land ownership.
Industrialization: Creating jobs through local manufacturing and green energy.

questions.prompt: Are you or your family currently receiving any social grants?
What is the biggest service delivery challenge in this ward (Electricity, Water, Safety)?
Will you support the ANC to continue its mandate of social transformation?

name: ANC Soweto Peoples Rally
objective: Demonstrate grassroots strength in Soweto and outline the 2026 Renewal Plan.
mainMessage: ANC: Renewing the mandate for social justice and economic transformation.
talkingPoints: NHI Implementation: Quality healthcare for all South Africans.
Social Grants: Protecting the most vulnerable through sustainable funding.
Infrastructure: Upgrading local roads and sanitation in Soweto.
